name: i-will-teach-you-to-be-rich
description: Ramit Sethi's I Will Teach You to Be Rich — a 6-week program to optimize credit cards, automate investments, create a Conscious Spending Plan, and design your Rich Life
useCase: Helps anyone take control of their finances through a practical 6-week system: credit card optimization, high-interest banking, automated investing, conscious spending, salary negotiation, and Rich Life design.
knownRisks: The 6-week program is a starting point — ongoing financial management requires sustained habits
